All 10 countries are Eurozone members, all exist in the database with 1-35 invoices each, and no Eurozone countries in the database are missing from the list.

pi_items.verified_value: Real data-based sample database - Open source Chinook database by Luis Rocha using real data from iTunes library
pi_items.source: GitHub repository https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database verified. Database contains 412 total invoices, 59 customers, 2240 invoice items across 24 billing countries

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the Chinook database, a real open-source sample database based on iTunes library data available from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database. The database contains 412 invoices across 24 countries. The metadata's euro_countries list is accurate and complete: all 10 listed countries (Austria, Belgium, Finland, France, Germany, Ireland, Italy, Netherlands, Portugal, Spain) are Eurozone members with 126 total invoices. Brazil has 35 invoices as claimed. The task's file paths and connection names are task configuration values. The Chinook database is not synthetic data but derived from real iTunes store transaction history.
